messages.text: This is my incubator. I decide what gets built here.
Erlich, it's my algorithm. I wrote it.
And I provided the roof over your head while you did it! 🏠
Fine. But the compression engine stays as is.
We need to pivot. Trust me on this one.
I finished migrating the servers last night. You're welcome.
Awesome. Did you stress-test the new cluster?
My code compiled on the first try. No errors. 🎉
The TechCrunch pitch deck is ready. You're going to do great, Richard! ✅
